touches.ai_summary: Inbound request from Daniel Flores at SwiftRelay expressing interest in conversation intelligence tools to improve rep productivity. Mentioned currently evaluating options including Chorus.

Qualification call with Daniel Flores covering team size (7 reps), current pain points around coaching consistency, and budget range. Daniel leads RevOps and is exploring tools to help new hires ramp faster. Confirmed active evaluation with Chorus in parallel.

questions_asked.question: What's driving your search for conversation intelligence right now?
questions_asked.answer: We've doubled our sales team in 6 months and coaching quality is inconsistent. New reps are taking too long to ramp.

questions_asked.question: How does your automation tier differ from Chorus's transcription features?
questions_asked.answer: Our unlimited automation tier includes workflow triggers, auto-logging to CRM, and custom playbook alerts—goes beyond transcription to actual workflow automation.

next_steps: Send Daniel use case materials for rep onboarding
Schedule discovery call to dive into current coaching process

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email with case study on EdTech customer with similar rep ramp challenges, plus pricing overview for 7-seat unlimited automation tier. Daniel responded confirming discovery call time and asking to include their newest sales manager.

questions_asked.question: Can we bring our newest sales manager into the discovery call?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely, would love to hear from someone close to the coaching process.

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Daniel walking through current coaching workflow, CRM setup (Salesforce), and key metrics they track. Discussed integration capabilities and unlimited automation use cases. Daniel focused on time-to-productivity for new hires.

questions_asked.question: What does your coaching process look like today without conversation intelligence?
questions_asked.answer: Managers manually review 1-2 calls per rep per week. It's time-intensive and we're missing patterns across the team.

questions_asked.question: Does your Salesforce integration auto-log call outcomes or just link recordings?
questions_asked.answer: Full auto-logging—activity type, duration, topics discussed, next steps, and sentiment score all sync automatically.

touches.ai_summary: Email with sandbox credentials and tutorial video. Daniel confirmed team has been testing the platform and likes the automation features. Mentioned Chorus demo scheduled for next week but still prefers our workflow integrations.
next_steps: Proposal call scheduled for end of week

touches.ai_summary: Proposal call presenting $6,500 ACV for 7 seats with unlimited automation tier. Walked through implementation timeline and training plan. Daniel asked about flexibility on seat count and expressed concern about executive buy-in since he's been driving this solo.

questions_asked.question: If we start with 5 seats can we add more mid-contract?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can do mid-contract seat adds, just prorated to your renewal date.

questions_asked.question: Who else needs to sign off on this purchase?
questions_asked.answer: My VP of Sales has final approval. I haven't looped him in yet but he trusts my tool recommendations.

objections: Need to make sure leadership is aligned before moving forward
next_steps: Daniel to discuss with VP of Sales

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email with proposal PDF, ROI calculator, and offer to join Daniel's conversation with his VP. Daniel replied that his VP wants to meet before signing and asked if we can be flexible on pricing given Chorus came in lower.

questions_asked.question: Chorus quoted us about 15% less—any flexibility on your end?
questions_asked.answer: Let's discuss on the exec call. I want to make sure we're comparing apples to apples on features, especially around automation.

next_steps: Exec meeting with VP of Sales scheduled

touches.ai_summary: Meeting with Daniel and VP of Sales to review business case, competitive positioning against Chorus, and ROI projections. VP asked about integration complexity and implementation timeline. Expressed concern about team adoption and wanted proof it wouldn't slow reps down. Daniel advocated strongly for the automation tier.

questions_asked.question: How long does implementation typically take for a team our size?
questions_asked.answer: Full rollout usually 2-3 weeks including training. Technical integration with Salesforce is often done in the first few days.

questions_asked.question: What if reps don't adopt it and it just becomes shelf-ware?
questions_asked.answer: We include adoption tracking in the platform and our CSM works with you on change management. Most customers see 80%+ weekly active usage within 30 days.

questions_asked.question: What's most important to you in making this decision?
questions_asked.answer: Honestly, price and proven ROI. We're lean and need to see this pay for itself in rep productivity within two quarters.

objections: Pricing is higher than Chorus and we're budget-conscious

touches.ai_summary: Pricing call with Daniel to discuss discount options. Offered 10% discount ($5,850 ACV) with annual commitment. Daniel appreciative but noted Chorus is still in play and he needs to finalize comparison with his VP this week. Agreed to decision timeline by end of next week.

questions_asked.question: If we sign annual can you match Chorus's price?
questions_asked.answer: I can get you to $5,850 annual which is 10% off. I can't go lower without removing features, and I think the automation tier is what really sets us apart for your use case.

questions_asked.question: What would make this a clear yes for you?
questions_asked.answer: If the VP feels confident in the ROI story and we're within striking distance on price, I think we move forward. I'm pushing hard for you guys internally.

next_steps: Daniel to present final comparison to VP
